criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and time spent on the app.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store analytics, in-app usage data

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features within the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and expert analysis

criteria.name: User Reviews
criteria.description: The average rating and sentiment of user reviews.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store reviews

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: The total number of app downloads.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store download statistics

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The uniqueness and creativity of the app's features.
criteria.sources: Expert analysis, tech blogs, and industry reports
